name: rad-code-review
description:
3-role adversarial code review for Claude Code, optimized for Opus 4.7 (Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5 compatible). Parallel tool-call pipeline, JSON-first subagent output, compaction-safe checkpointing with `--resume`, and `--non-interactive` mode for agents/CI. Blame-aware diff scoping, 14-pattern AI slop detection (hallucinated imports, fake error handling, ghost type assertions, mock-shaped fallbacks, etc.), framework-specific IDOR for Next.js / Express / Fastify / Django / Rails / Go, WCAG 2.2 + dynamic ARIA state detection, performance heuristics, severity-ranked findings with release verdict, accepted-risk expiry enforcement. Includes a `code-reviewer` agent for proactive autonomous review.

**v4.0 breaking change.** The `UCR-` heritage prefix on config (`.ucrconfig.yml`), finding IDs (`UCR-NNN`), and state/history directories (`.ucr/`) was renamed to `RADCR-` / `.radcrconfig.yml` / `.radcr/` for naming consistency with the plugin. Existing users on v3.x must rename `.ucrconfig.yml` → `.radcrconfig.yml` and `.ucr/` → `.radcr/` (no content changes required). See README's Naming section for details.
